p.strong: Epidemic broadcast with Lamport clock versioning and deterministic conflict resolution.

div.p: Implementation Note: UDP is used for speed. Reliability is achieved through periodic re-broadcast (epidemic entropy).
Tie-Breaking: Determinism is guaranteed by (Version, NodeID) tuple comparison.

ol.li: Convergence: Every node eventually sees the highest version.
Immutability: Once a version is assigned to a key/value pair, the value cannot change for that version.
Anti-Entropy: TTL prevents broadcast storms; SeenCache prevents redundant I/O.

g.text: 2. If versions equal AND remote.NodeID > local.NodeID -> ACCEPT

g.title: Thread-safe local state storage for Lamport-versioned entries.
Active agent managing UDP transmission and peer discovery.
LRU cache to prevent infinite message amplification.
